steps.title: Match input and output
steps.content: The function $h(x)$ gives the height of the object in feet after $x$ seconds. In the statement $h(1.6)=1.44$, the input $1.6$ is the time after the object is thrown, and the output $1.44$ is the height.

steps.title: Interpret the statement
steps.content: The statement means the object's height is $1.44$ feet at $1.6$ seconds. It does not mean the time is $1.44$ seconds, and it does not describe speed because the function gives height, not rate of change. The answer is A.
